## Solution Design Document

# 6000018866 3801-Wastage reclass parking Doc

| Creation Date | 1/8/2026 |  |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Change Requestor | Pavithra S |  |
| Functional SME | BALAJI RAGHU | 1/8/2026 |
| Template Owner | VASIF ABDULLAYEV | 1/8/2026 |
| Developer | Pavithra S | 1/8/2026 |

# Functional Specification Summary

*A single paragraph context-problem-solution summary. The goal is to make the purpose click for the reader. Best to write as a final step.*

As a part of the SG wastage billing automation , we had created a program (ZFI\_WASTAGE\_RECLASS) \-  that would automatically create and park  a reclassification journal entry for reclassifying the foodPanda revenue from restaurant recorded in the corresponding revenue GLs into the wastage and refund GLs in case of full refund and full wastage orders. During the first run of this program in production , the business noticed that the document type of the parked entry is SA and according to the recent directive they had got from group accounting , the JE type should be SX whenever  IC GL 86600099 ( DMart commission rev) is involved . Hence it was requested to change the JE doc type as SX instead of SA for the entries created through this program.  
In addition , we will also need to introduce the posting date field in the input screen of the program , so that the business can enter the posting date to be used while creating the reclassification document .

# Background and Context

*Specify the background and context to frame the rest of the design document. Section should be facts \- not opinion.*  
As a part of the SG wastage billing automation , we had created a program (ZFI\_WASTAGE\_RECLASS) \-  that would automatically create and park  a reclassification journal entry for reclassifying the foodPanda revenue from restaurant recorded in the corresponding revenue GLs into the wastage and refund GLs in case of full refund and full wastage orders. During the first run of this program in production , the business noticed that the document type of the parked entry is SA and according to the recent directive they had got from group accounting , the JE type should be SX whenever  IC GL 86600099 ( DMart commission rev) is involved . Hence it was requested to change the JE doc type as SX instead of SA for the entries created through this program.  
In addition , we will also need to introduce the posting date field in the input screen of the program , so that the business can enter the posting date to be used while creating the reclassification document.

**PFB the original FS of the reclass program \- [FS\_TS\_6000018514](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1DgrMWRxmnOYxn87Hkk4v_uXiyEY1Wm3cZ9NUkhK_Aw0/edit?usp=sharing)**

# Requirements

*Explain the functionalities the change is expected to deliver. Detailed breakdown of features and capabilities that users and other systems will interact with. Also set clear boundaries and define what is out of scope if necessary.*

## Requirement \#1

To change the document type of the reclassification document type to SX instead of SA.

![][image1]  
![][image2]

## Requirement \#2

Introduce a new field in the input screen of the program for inputting the posting date with which the reclassification journal entry is to be created. The field can be named as Rec doc posting date and this should be a mandatory field when the program is run with post reclassification option.  
![][image3]

## Dependencies / Constraints

*Indicate any dependencies or constraints that may affect development in terms of requirements from internal or external applications or teams, limited access to legacy systems, time constraints, or data restrictions. Also, specify schedule dependencies (e.g., interface or batch jobs that run prior to execution).*

## Security, Authorization, Integrity, and Controls (If Applicable)

***Very Important Section***  
Detail the security requirements for processing the development, any data integrity issues associated with it, and the teams responsible for processing the same.

# Technical Specification / Solution

*Explain the solution details like: Architecture Diagram, Data Flow Charts, Customizing settings, Configuration, Data Model, Dependencies, Development Objects, Pseudo-Codes, Security considerations, Error Handling etc.*
